themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And Elijah said unto her, Fear not; go and do as thou hast said: but make me thereof a little...".
